--- quickinfo ---
/**
 * - Analytics provided at ln 59 col 14 by `Analytics.Default`
 * - AppService provided at ln 62 col 21 by `AppService.Default`
 * - Database provided at ln 56 col 2 by `DatabaseLive`
 * - EventService provided at ln 61 col 21 by `EventService.Default`
 * - EventsRepository provided at ln 58 col 21 by `EventsRepository.Default`
 * - UserRepository provided at ln 57 col 21 by `UserRepository.Default`
 * - UserService provided at ln 60 col 21 by `UserService.Default`
 * 
 * - Analytics required at ln 61 col 21 by `EventService.Default`, ln 60 col 21 by `UserService.Default`
 * - Database required at ln 58 col 21 by `EventsRepository.Default`, ln 57 col 21 by `UserRepository.Default`
 * - EventService required at ln 62 col 21 by `AppService.Default`
 * - EventsRepository required at ln 61 col 21 by `EventService.Default`
 * - UserRepository required at ln 60 col 21 by `UserService.Default`
 * - UserService required at ln 62 col 21 by `AppService.Default`
 */
